text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Everyone! The time has finally come… 
…For the last event of the day, the relay race!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
The rules are very simple! The relay begins with a 1200 meter 
leg, then 1600 meters, and 2000 meters! Each leg's assigned 
racer will pass the baton to their teammate for the next——

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Until the very end, where the team captains will 
face off on a 2400 meter track!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
The total points each team earned throughout today's events 
are almost the same!! It all comes down to this relay race!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Come on. We're gonna have an all-out battle! Me and you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ………………Heh heh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All right then. Shall we? 
——My cute little Pokke.

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
All the competitors have taken their places, and our starters 
are on their marks for the first leg of the relay! 
……And they're off!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
——The white team's second racer Agnes Digital is slowly 
but steadily extending her lead!! She showed what she could 
do on 2000 meters, and she's every bit as heroic on 1600!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huff, huff, huff—— 
Sorry to keep you waiting, Tachyon-saaaaaan!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I'll be going on ahead, Tap-kun.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Ahead, huh? Heh. Say, Digital… 
I know this tiny lead ain't the best you can do.

text_block_list.name: Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text: I might've lost our race, but it looks like I really took it outta you. So—— This is our chance!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
Tap Dance City
text_block_list.text:
Graaaaaaaaaaaaaah!! 
Get ready, Cap'n!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
(It seems the concept of "restraint" means nothing to you all. 
Honestly, you are all incorrigible——)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Have some sympathy, why don't you! How do you think I feel 
every time you force me to the limit——!?

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Storming down the third leg, it's the white team's Agnes Tachyon 
and the red team's Tap Dance City!! They're neck and neck! 
It's a dead heat!! And…!!

text_block_list.name: Tap & Tachyon
text_block_list.text: GO!

text_block_list.name: Fuji & Pokke
text_block_list.text:
HHAAAAAAAAAAAAAH!! 
GRAAAAAAAAAAAHHH!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And now they've passed the batons to their captains!! 
Jungle Pocket and Fuji Kiseki break through into the 
final leeeeeeg!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna win… I wanna win, I wanna win! I wanna beat you!! 
Your back showed me the way for so long… And now… 
I wanna pass it!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
So I can let you look at MY back… 
And see how much I've grown!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
So you can see just how much you've done for me! 
And look ahead at me with pride!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No! I won't. I won't leave your sight. 
I can still keep showing you the way! 
I won't let anything make me stop!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Please, don't thank me. Don't say a thing. 
Can't you see just how much you've given me all along?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can't let you pass me. Not yet. 
Not when there's still so much more for me to give you. 
So much more of me for you to see!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
They turn the corner and enter the home stretch! 
Fuji Kiseki in the lead! Jungle Pocket in hot pursuit!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
We're not done yet!! 
My race is just getting started!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: I am going to beat you… FUJI KISEKI!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No…!! 
I'm not losing to you… JUNGLE POCKET!!

text_block_list.name: Fuji & Pokke
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHH!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
THEY CROSS THE FINISH LIIIIIINE!! 
The winner of the relay race is…!! By a neck——

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki takes it!! 
The winner is the white teeeeaaaaaaaaaam!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
————Huff… Huff… 
Aww…

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
……Dammit… 
You're so tough…!!!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text:
Haha—— 
…………You really are… so damn awesome——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha…! Of course I am.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I can forget all about my pain, and smile like I don't have a care in the world. Because I'm your Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ——And I want to stay your Fuji Kiseki… Forever.
